sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the state clearly:
- Grid: All 9 blocks are gray (color=g)
- Right strip: rows 0-17 WHITE (18 rows), rows 18-63 GREEN (46 rows)
- Cursor: Left side at rows 18-21, cols 13-16 (16 pixels); Right side at rows 19-20, cols 40 (2 pixels)
Previously the right strip had rows 0-9 WHITE, rows 10-63 GREEN. Now it has rows 0-17 WHITE, rows 18-63 GREEN. So the right strip got WORSE - more white rows.
The cursor also changed - it's now only at the right end (cols 40, 2 pixels) instead of the previous position.
Wait, let me reconsider. The cursor on the right side is now at cols 40, which is different from before. Previously it was at cols 41-42. So the cursor moved left by 1 column.
This is confusing. The grid reset to all gray, the right strip got worse (more white), and the cursor moved. It seems like clicking the corner blocks when all blocks were green triggered some kind of "undo" or reset that went backwards.
Let me think about this differently. The game mechanic seems to be:
1. In normal mode: click diamond blocks to complete pattern, which advances cursor and fills right strip
2. In post-game-over mode: blocks can be toggled green/gray freely
But I'm still not completing the level. Let me reconsider what the goal might be.
Looking at the right strip: it had 108 green pixels before, now it has 92. The cursor moved from cols 41-42 to col 40. This suggests the cursor moved BACKWARDS.
Maybe the game is about matching the purple dot pattern, and I need to do it in normal mode (not post-game-over). But I already tried that 15 times and it didn't complete the level.
Wait - maybe the goal is to get the right strip FULLY green (all 64 rows). Currently rows 0-17 are white. 
Let me try a completely different approach. Maybe I need to click the diamond blocks in the correct order to advance the cursor all the way to the right, which would fill the right strip completely.
But I already did 15 diamond patterns (60 clicks) and the level wasn't complete. The right strip still had white rows.
Let me reconsider: maybe the issue is that I need to complete MORE patterns. The right strip started with some green and some white. Each pattern completion advances the cursor and adds more green. I need to keep going until the right strip is fully green.
But wait, the right strip went BACKWARDS after I clicked corner blocks. Let me go back to the normal game mode and try completing more diamond patterns.
Actually, looking at the current state - the grid is all gray, which is the "normal" starting state. The cursor is at the right end. Let me try clicking diamond blocks again to see if the normal pattern completion mechanic still works.
Let me try completing one diamond pattern: click (50,30), (55,25), (55,35), (60,30).
